goal: Make the real-adapter CUDA handoff self-contained for final v0 closeout by adding the local closeout command after evidence bundle transfer, without changing release acceptance policy or claiming GO.
head: af02172
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may make the handoff artifact self-contained by adding local closeout-after-bundle-transfer commands and refresh current NOT_GO handoff artifacts only.
required_evidence: Handoff JSON/Markdown/Shell include the local closeout command for a copied real-adapter evidence bundle archive
Existing handoff and closeout tests pass
Current v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
warnings: M6-RC and v0 remain NOT_GO until real trained CUDA adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.
This gate only improves operator handoff/closeout flow; it does not edit release review docs or verifier acceptance criteria.

phase_notes.plan: Add a local closeout-after-bundle-transfer command to the generated CUDA handoff artifact.
phase_notes.audit: Current handoff creates the evidence bundle archive and runs readiness on the CUDA host, while WORKING.md separately lists the local closeout command. Embedding that command in the handoff reduces the remaining external-evidence handoff gap.
phase_notes.build: Patch build_real_adapter_handoff.py and focused tests, then regenerate current NOT_GO handoff artifacts through the existing recertification runner.
phase_notes.check: Focused handoff/closeout tests pass, recertification remains expected NOT_GO, generated handoff artifacts include local_closeout_after_bundle_transfer, and diff check passes.
phase_notes.done: Ready to stage, run git diff --cached --check, commit, and push this verified handoff improvement.

pabcd.approved_scope: Self-contained real-adapter handoff closeout command, focused tests, regenerated current NOT_GO handoff artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
